title: Organigram Q1 2022 Earnings Preview
text: Organigram Q1 2022 Earnings Preview from Seeking Alpha. Consensus Estimates: The consensus EPS Estimate was -$0.03 (+82.4% Y/Y) and the consensus Revenue Estimate was $23.28M (+20.4% Y/Y). Over the 3 months prior to the preview, EPS estimates had seen 2 upward revisions and 1 downward revision. Actual Results: Net revenue in the first fiscal quarter ended November 30 came in at $30.4 million, up 22 percent sequentially and 57 percent year-over-year. Net loss for the quarter improved to $1.3 million vs. the $34.34 million last year in the same reporting period. Company Highlights: In Q1, yield per plant was 129 grams, compared to 86 grams in Q1 of fiscal 2021, and cost per gram had been reduced by half, while increasing THC levels. The company also completed the acquisition of Laurentian Organic during this period.
